text:
Mental Status - Recalls Nursing Home Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indentifies whether or not the resident was able to recall that they are in a nursing home. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
110 C0900Z_RCALL_NONE_CD C0900Z_RCALL_NONE_CD C0900Z Staff Assessment of Mental Status - Recalls None of Above Code CHAR 1 If equal to one, the data in this column identifies that none of the above were recalled. -=Not assessed/no
